---
title: ""
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, author, date, categories]
---
```{=html}
<div style="padding:3rem 6vw; max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto;">

  <div style="margin-bottom:2.5rem;">
    <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.15em; color:#f0a500; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">// articles</p>
    <h1 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4vw,2.8rem); font-weight:800; color:#e8e4d9; margin:0 0 0.5rem 0;">Ce que les praticiens écrivent</h1>
    <p style="color:#6b7280; font-size:0.9rem; margin:0 0 2rem 0;">Articles publiés sur Medium, LinkedIn, Dev.to — agrégés ici.</p>

    <!-- Filtres -->
    <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.5rem;">
      <button onclick="filterArticles('all')"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #f0a500; color:#f0a500; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="f-btn active">
        Tous
      </button>
      <button onclick="filterArticles('data')"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="f-btn">
        Data
      </button>
      <button onclick="filterArticles('devops')"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="f-btn">
        DevOps
      </button>
      <button onclick="filterArticles('cloud')"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="f-btn">
        Cloud
      </button>
      <button onclick="filterArticles('ia')"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="f-btn">
        IA
      </button>
      <button onclick="filterArticles('cyber')"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="f-btn">
        Cyber
      </button>
      <button onclick="filterArticles('dev')"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;" class="f-btn">
        Dev
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Grille articles -->
  <div id="articles-grid" style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(300px,1fr)); gap:1.25rem;">
  </div>

  <p id="no-results" style="display:none; color:#6b7280; font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.85rem; margin-top:2rem;">
    Aucun article dans cette catégorie pour le moment.
  </p>

</div>

<script>
const articles = [
  // Alimenté automatiquement — exemple de structure :
  // { title, author, country, date, category, source, url, excerpt }
];

function getCategoryColor(cat) {
  const colors = {
    data:   { color:'#60a5fa', bg:'#60a5fa0d', border:'#60a5fa22' },
    devops: { color:'#34d399', bg:'#34d3990d', border:'#34d39922' },
    cloud:  { color:'#a78bfa', bg:'#a78bfa0d', border:'#a78bfa22' },
    ia:     { color:'#f0a500', bg:'#f0a5000d', border:'#f0a50022' },
    cyber:  { color:'#ff4560', bg:'#ff45600d', border:'#ff456022' },
    dev:    { color:'#f472b6', bg:'#f472b60d', border:'#f472b622' },
  };
  return colors[cat] || colors.data;
}

function renderArticles(list) {
  const grid = document.getElementById('articles-grid');
  const noRes = document.getElementById('no-results');
  if (!list.length) {
    grid.innerHTML = '';
    noRes.style.display = 'block';
    return;
  }
  noRes.style.display = 'none';
  grid.innerHTML = list.map(a => {
    const c = getCategoryColor(a.category);
    return `
    <a href="${a.url}" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none;">
      <div style="background:#12141a; border:1px solid #1e2128; border-radius:6px; padding:1.5rem; height:100%; display:flex; flex-direction:column; transition:border-color 0.2s;"
           onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='#f0a500'" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='#1e2128'">
        <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.65rem; letter-spacing:0.1em; text-transform:uppercase; color:${c.color}; border:1px solid ${c.border}; background:${c.bg}; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:2px; width:fit-content; margin-bottom:0.75rem;">
          ${a.category.toUpperCase()}
        </span>
        <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:0.95rem; font-weight:700; color:#e8e4d9; margin:0 0 0.4rem 0; flex:1;">${a.title}</h3>
        <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.72rem; color:#6b7280; margin-bottom:0.75rem;">
          ${a.author} ${a.country} · ${a.source} · ${a.date}
        </p>
        <p style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#9ca3af; line-height:1.6; margin-bottom:1rem;">${a.excerpt}</p>
        <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.72rem; color:#f0a500; letter-spacing:0.06em;">Lire →</span>
      </div>
    </a>`;
  }).join('');
}

function filterArticles(cat) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.f-btn').forEach(b => {
    b.style.borderColor = '#1e2128';
    b.style.color = '#6b7280';
  });
  event.target.style.borderColor = '#f0a500';
  event.target.style.color = '#f0a500';
  const filtered = cat === 'all' ? articles : articles.filter(a => a.category === cat);
  renderArticles(filtered);
}

renderArticles(articles);
</script>
```
